# ATS Platform Comparison 2026: Ashby vs Greenhouse vs Workable vs Lever vs Pinpoint

## Summary

A composite of 2026 pricing and positioning data across the major ATS platforms surfaces clear market segmentation by company size, hiring velocity, and technical sophistication. The "right ATS" decision is almost entirely determined by headcount tier, integration surface, and data-orientation of the TA team - confirming the brief's directive to always ask for context before recommending.

**Market segments (2026 consensus):**

| ATS | Best fit | Pricing model | Standout trait |
|---|---|---|---|
| Ashby | Series A-C tech startups, 50-1,000 employees, data-driven TA teams | $400/mo Foundations, ~$5-8 PEPM; recruiter seats $350-750/mo | Analytics described as "5-10 years ahead" of competitors; API-first architecture |
| Greenhouse | Enterprise, dedicated recruiting teams, compliance-heavy environments | Custom pricing only (no published rates) | Structured hiring frameworks, scorecards and interview kits, deep compliance tooling |
| Workable | SMBs (1-100 employees), hiring generalists, budget-conscious | $149-$189/mo standard; up to $599/mo; transparent pricing | AI sourcing + video interviews built-in at no add-on cost; combined ATS+HRIS |
| Lever | Mid-market to enterprise, collaborative hiring stakeholders | Custom; scales better per-user at volume than Pinpoint | Broad job board integrations, established ecosystem, strong LinkedIn RSC support |
| Pinpoint | Mid-market in-house TA teams (5-50 in team), bias-reduction focus | $600-$2,000/mo depending on team size | Blind screening, built-in structured interview tools, modern pipeline UI |
| Rippling Recruiting | Companies already on Rippling HRIS, wanting unified people ops | Bundled with Rippling platform pricing | Zero ATS-to-HRIS handoff friction (native, same platform), unified onboarding |

## Key Quotations / Statistics

- Ashby: "Reporting capabilities are 5-10 years ahead of most ATS platforms" (practitioner review, The Daily Hire)
- Workable: Rates 4.5/5; offers AI sourcing, video interviews, assessments without add-on costs at higher tiers
- Ashby: Rates 4.8/5; "API-first architecture" with well-documented, powerful APIs for custom integrations
- Greenhouse: Category leader by enterprise mindshare despite opaque pricing

## Annotations for stinger-forge

- The platform selection guide (guides/00) should present these 6 platforms in the table above with a clear headcount-tier decision tree
- Do NOT publish pricing numbers as authoritative - all pricing listed is from 2026 practitioner reviews, not vendor sources; use ranges with "verify with vendor" notes
- Rippling Recruiting deserves its own decision path: "Are you already on Rippling HRIS?" - if yes, Rippling Recruiting dramatically simplifies the handoff
- Ashby's analytics differentiation is real and consistently cited; this should be weighted heavily in the decision matrix for TA teams that will use data to drive decisions
- Greenhouse's custom-pricing-only policy means it is effectively inaccessible to small teams and very early-stage startups without dedicated TA budget
